questionText: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q1][medium] Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text: SELECT DISTINCT D."Fiscal Year" AS fiscal_year, SUM(S."Unit Price Discount Pct" * S."Total Product Cost" / 100) AS total_revenue, SUM(S."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost, SUM(S."Total Product Cost") - SUM(S."Unit Price Discount Pct" * S."Total Product Cost") AS total_order_lines, --0.0 AS gross_profit, --0.0 AS gross_margin_pct, SUM(S."Unit Price Discount Pct" * S."Total Product Cost" / 100) * 100.0 / SUM(S."Total Product Cost") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct FROM Sales_Territory_ST JOIN Sales_Territory ON ST."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales_S_Order_S ON ST."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales_Order ON ST."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales_Order_Line ON ST."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST."SalesOrderLineKey" WHERE D."Fiscal Year" = D."Fiscal Year" GROUP BY D."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY D."Fiscal Year" ASC

questionText: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q2][hard] Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

payload.text: SELECT DISTINCT "Channel", SUM("Unit Price Discount Pct") AS total_revenue, (SUM("Unit Price Discount Pct") / NULLIF(SUM("Order Quantity") * NULLIF(SUM("Unit Price Discount Pct"), 0.0), 0.0) * 100) AS revenue_share_pct, COUNT("SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_orders, COUNT("SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines, AVG("Unit Price Discount Pct") AS avg_line_amount, (NULLIF(SUM("Product Standard Cost") * NULLIF(SUM("Order Quantity") * NULLIF(SUM("Unit Price Discount Pct"), 0.0), 0.0), 0.0) / NULLIF(SUM("Order Quantity") * NULLIF(SUM("Unit Price Discount Pct"), 0.0), 0.0) * 100) AS gross_margin_pct FROM "Sales_Order" JOIN "Sales_Territory" ON "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Territory"."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Reseller" ON "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Reseller"."ResellerKey" JOIN "Product" ON "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "ProductKey" WHERE "Sales_Order"."Channel" = 'Internet' OR "Sales_Order"."Channel" = 'Reseller' OR ("Sales_Order"."Channel" = 'Sales_Order_Line' AND "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Reseller"."ResellerKey") GROUP BY "Channel" ORDER BY total_revenue_

questionText: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q2][hard] Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

0.0) * 100) AS revenue_share_pct, COUNT("SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_orders, COUNT("SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines, AVG("Unit Price Discount Pct") AS avg_line_amount, (NULLIF(SUM("Product Standard Cost") * NULLIF(SUM("Order Quantity") * NULLIF(SUM("Unit Price Discount Pct"), 0.0), 0.0), 0.0) / NULLIF(SUM("Order Quantity") * NULLIF(SUM("Unit Price Discount Pct"), 0.0), 0.0) * 100) AS payload.text: SELECT category."Category", SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") AS revenue, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") * (100.0 / SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct")) AS revenue_share_pct, SUM(sales."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") * (1.0 - (SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") / 100.0)) AS gross_profit, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") * (1.0 - (SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") / 100.0)) * (100.0 / SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct")) AS gross_margin_pct FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales ON Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales."ProductKey" JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" GROUP BY category."Category" ORDER BY revenue_desc_descORDERBY."Total Product Cost" DESC, units_sold_descORDERBY."Order Quantity" DESC, gross_profit_descORDERBY."Total Product Cost" DESC, gross_margin_pct_descORDERBY."Total Product Cost" DESC, category."Category"

Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT Product."Product", Product."Category", Product."Subcategory", SUM(Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") AS revenue, SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, (SUM(Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."ShipDateKey")) * 0.01 AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."ShipDateKey")) * 0.01 AS margin_pct FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" GROUP BY Product."Product", Product."Category", Product."Subcategory" ORDER BY revenueDescLIMIT10."Product" ASC, Product."Category", Product."Subcategory", revenueDescLIMIT10."Unit Price" ASC, units_soldASC."Sales Order Line" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Model" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Category" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Subcategory" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Product" DESC

Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT Product."Product", Product."Category", Product."Subcategory", SUM(Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") AS revenue, SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, (SUM(Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."ShipDateKey")) * 0.01 AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."ShipDateKey")) * 0.01 AS margin_pct FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" GROUP BY Product."Product", Product."Category", Product."Subcategory" ORDER BY revenueDescLIMIT10."Product" ASC, Product."Category", Product."Subcategory" ASC, units_soldASC."Order Quantity" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Product" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Category" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Subcategory" ASC, margin_pctDescLIMIT10."Product" DESC

Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

payload.text: SELECT rbBusinessType."Business Type", COUNT(rr."ResellerKey") AS reseller_count, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") AS total_revenue, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") / COUNT(rr."ResellerKey") AS revenue_per_reseller, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") - SUM(sales."ShipDateKey") AS gross_profit, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") * 0.15 AS margin_pct FROM Sales_Order_sos JOIN Sales_Order_sos_sales ON sos_sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = sales."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Reseller_sos_rr ON sos_rr."ResellerKey" = rr."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Order_sos_sales ON rr."ResellerKey" = sales."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory_sos_sts ON rr."Sales Order" = sts."Region" WHERE sos_sos_rr."Channel" = "Reseller" GROUP BY rbBusinessType."Business Type" ORDER BY total_revenue_

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

questionText: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q9][hard] Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

payload.text: SELECT DISTINCT DISTINCT_SUBCATEGORY."Subcategory", COUNT(SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines, SUM(UnitPrice."Unit Price") AS revenue, SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(UnitPrice."Unit Price") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit, AVG(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") AS avg_list_price, SUM(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS gross_profit, ROUND(SUM(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") * 100, 100) AS margin_pct FROM Sales_Order JOIN SalesOrderLineKey ON SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Product ON ProductKey."ProductKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."ProductKey" JOIN ProductStandardCost ON ProductStandardCost."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Reseller ON Reseller."ResellerKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Customer ON Customer."CustomerKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."CustomerKey" JOIN Date ON Date."DateKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."DateKey" WHERE Date."Fiscal Year" = '2024' AND Date."Month" = 'March' GROUP BY Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

SELECT DISTINCT DISTINCT_SUBCATEGORY."Subcategory", COUNT(SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines, SUM(UnitPrice."Unit Price") AS revenue, SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS Reseller ON Reseller."ResellerKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Customer ON Customer."CustomerKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."CustomerKey" JOIN Date ON Date."DateKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."DateKey" WHERE Date."Fiscal Year" = '2024' AND Date."Month" = 'March' GROUP BY root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

SELECT DISTINCT DISTINCT_SUBCATEGORY."Subcategory", COUNT(SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines, SUM(UnitPrice."Unit Price") AS revenue, SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(UnitPrice."Unit Price") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit, AVG(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") AS avg_list_price, SUM(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS gross_profit, ROUND(SUM(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") * 100, 100) AS margin_pct FROM Sales_Order JOIN SalesOrderLineKey ON SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Product ON ProductKey."ProductKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."ProductKey" JOIN ProductStandardCost ON ProductStandardCost."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Reseller ON Reseller."ResellerKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Customer ON Customer."CustomerKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."CustomerKey" JOIN Date ON Date."DateKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."DateKey" WHERE Date."Fiscal Year" = '2024' AND Date."Month" = 'March' GROUP BY DISTINCT_SUBCATEGORY."Subcategory" ORDER BY payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

questionText: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q9][hard] Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

payload.text: SELECT DISTINCT DISTINCT_SUBCATEGORY."Subcategory", COUNT(SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines, SUM(UnitPrice."Unit Price") AS revenue, SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(UnitPrice."Unit Price") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit, AVG(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") AS avg_list_price, SUM(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") AS gross_profit, ROUND(SUM(ProductStandardCost."Product Standard Cost") * SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") / SUM(OrderQuantity."Order Quantity") * 100, 100) AS margin_pct FROM Sales_Order JOIN SalesOrderLineKey ON SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" = OrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Product ON ProductKey."ProductKey" = OrderLineKey."ProductKey" JOIN ProductStandardCost ON ProductStandardCost."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Reseller ON Reseller."ResellerKey" = OrderLineKey."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" = OrderLineKey."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Customer ON Customer."CustomerKey" = OrderLineKey."CustomerKey" JOIN Date ON Date."DateKey" = OrderLineKey."DateKey" WHERE Date."Fiscal Year" = '2024' AND Date."Month" = 'March' GROUP BY DISTINCT_SUBCATEGORY."Subcategory" ORDER BY current_revenue, EXP2PRINT10."CustomerKey" AS prior_year, EXP2PRINT10."CustomerKey" AS current_year, EXP2PRINT10."CustomerKey" AS prior_revenue, EXP2PRINT10."CustomerKey" AS current_revenue, EXP2PRINT10."CustomerKey" AS yoy_growth_pct FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales ON Sales."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesOrderLineKey" GROUP BY "Channel", "Category", "SalesTerritoryKey" ORDER BY "Channel", "Category", "SalesTerritoryKey" ASC, "Category" ASC, "SalesTerritoryKey" ASC, "CustomerKey" Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

columnref ::= "\"Customer\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"DateKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Date\"" | "\"Date\"" "." questionText: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

questionText: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

EXP2PRINT10."CustomerKey" AS yoy_growth_pct FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales ON Sales."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = questionLabel: [Q11][easy] Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

columnref ::= "\"Customer\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"DateKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Date\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Fiscal Year\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Fiscal Quarter\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Month\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"MonthKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Full Date\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"ProductKey\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Product\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Standard Cost\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Color\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"List Price\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Business Type\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Order Quantity\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Unit Price\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Extended Amount\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Product Standard Cost\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Total Product Cost\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Sales Amount\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Unit Price Discount Pct\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" "." "\"SalesOrderLineKey\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" "." selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

columnref ::= "\"Customer\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"DateKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Date\"" | "\"Date\"" "." payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""
